Airdrop Insights

Announcements

Plasma Raises $24M Led By Framework and Bitfinex/USD₮0 to Build the Leading Blockchain for Stablecoins

March 13, 2025
|
2

In connection with this, we are holding an airdrop. Check your eligibility by verifying ownership with a currently active wallet.

Announcements

Plasma Raises $24M Led By Framework and Bitfinex/USD₮0 to Build the Leading Blockchain for Stablecoins

February 13, 2025
|
2

We’re thrilled to announce that we’ve raised $24M across our Seed and Series A, led by Framework and Bitfinex/USD₮0.
